research_basis: W3C Trace Context defines vendor-neutral trace identity propagation using traceparent/tracestate.
OpenTelemetry span semantic conventions emphasize consistent span attributes for analysis.
SRE observability practice uses trace/monitoring evidence to detect failure and latency anomalies.
rules: Trace context must use a 32-hex trace_id and 16-hex span IDs.
Root span must exist and all non-root parents must resolve.
Span order must be valid and expected stages must appear.
Each span must bind to artifact references.
Trace summary counts must reconcile with span data.
